headlines.description: Sign up for the Breaking News US ... CEST · Share · Prefer the Guardian on Google · SpaceX has confidentially filed for an initial public offering on the US stock market, according to reports from Bloomberg and the Wall Street ...

headlines.title: SpaceX files for IPO, sources say, offering investors stake in Musk's space ambitions | Reuters
headlines.description: A ‌confidential filing allows ... prepares to file for an initial public offering (IPO), in Starbase, Texas, U.S. March 31, 2026......

headlines.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX Files to Go Public, Setting Stage for Huge I.P.O. - The New York Times
headlines.description: SpaceX, Elon Musk’s rocket and satellite maker, filed confidentially on Wednesday for an initial public offering, according to two people familiar with the company, setting the stage for what could be one of the largest offerings ever.

headlines.title: SpaceX Said to File Confidentially for IPO Before AI Rivals - Bloomberg
headlines.description: SpaceX has filed confidentially for an initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, bringing billionaire Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and AI company closer to delivering the biggest-ever listing.

headlines.title: SpaceX files for IPO, setting stage for massive offering - The Washington Post
headlines.description: The aerospace company, valued at more than $1 trillion, could break the record for the largest public offering in history, according to reports.

headlines.title: SpaceX confidentially files for IPO, setting stage for record offering
headlines.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX has confidentially filed for an IPO with the Securities and Exchange Commission, sources told CNBC's David Faber, bringing Elon Musk's rocket company one step closer to what's expected to be a record public offering.

headlines.title: SpaceX files confidentially for IPO that will rewrite the record books
headlines.description: SpaceX files confidentially for a record-breaking IPO targeting a $1.75T valuation and $80B raise, driven by Starlink growth and its xAI merger. ... Elon Musk’s rocket and satellite company submitted its draft registration to the U.S. Securities ...

key_angle: Starlink IPO expected in 2026, followed by SpaceX IPO in Q4 2026
